title: Academy victorious over Relatives
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Camdeboo Football Academy from Graaff-Reinet claimed a 2-0 victory over Buffalo City Relatives FC from East London in an intense ABC Motsepe League match last Sunday at the Botanical Sport Grounds.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Camdeboo Football Academy from Graaff-Reinet claimed a 2-0 victory over Buffalo City Relatives FC from East London in an intense ABC Motsepe League match last Sunday at the Botanical Sport Grounds."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This crucial win comes as a relief for Academy, who were teetering on the edge of relegation at ninth place on the league log."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Academy prepared well for the victory and had tough training practice over the weeks.\"The team worked very hard to gain this victory,\" said coach Luyanda Noda.","html":"The Academy prepared well for the victory and had tough training practice over the weeks.
\"The team worked very hard to gain this victory,\" said coach Luyanda Noda."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The players were prepared emotionally and physically during the training practices and were encouraged to be positive at all times.\"","html":"\"The players were prepared emotionally and physically during the training practices and were encouraged to be positive at all times.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Camdeboo captain Mphuthumi Mthembu said they approached the game differently to make their win.","html":"Camdeboo captain Mphuthumi Mthembu said they approached the game differently to make their win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The game should have started at 15:00, but was delayed due to referees arriving late.","html":"The game should have started at 15:00, but was delayed due to referees arriving late."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was a close game with both teams eager to gain winning points.","html":"It was a close game with both teams eager to gain winning points."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Camdeboo FAD wasted no time asserting dominance, scoring their first goal before the end of the first half.","html":"Camdeboo FAD wasted no time asserting dominance, scoring their first goal before the end of the first half."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They doubled their lead to 2-0 in the second half, putting the visitors under pressure.","html":"They doubled their lead to 2-0 in the second half, putting the visitors under pressure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Relatives fought back courageously, but could not break through the tight defence of their opponents. Academy is now in seventh position on the log .","html":"The Relatives fought back courageously, but could not break through the tight defence of their opponents. Academy is now in seventh position on the log ."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The managers and coaches thank the football supporters for their support.","html":"The managers and coaches thank the football supporters for their support."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
